title: Free Time and Hobbies
text: In her free time, Lina likes doing different activities. She enjoys reading books and listening to music at home. On weekends, she often goes out with her friends to relax and have fun.

Lina also has a hobby that helps her forget stress. She enjoys drawing and painting because these activities make her feel calm. Although she is sometimes tired after work, she always tries to make time for her hobbies.
Having hobbies is important for Lina because they help her stay happy and balanced in her daily life.

questions.question: What does Lina like to do in her free time?
questions.answer: She likes reading and listening to music

questions.question: When does Lina usually go out with her friends?
Why does Lina like her hobbies?
questions.answer: Because they make her feel calm

questions.question: Does Lina make time for her hobbies when she is tired?
questions.answer: Yes, she tries to make time

questions.question: Why are hobbies important for Lina?
questions.answer: Because they help her stay happy and balanced

questions.question: Why do you think Lina tries to keep hobbies even when she is busy?
questions.answer: Because hobbies help her relax and reduce stress
